message_text: I need to discuss this because your outstanding amount looks incorrect to me.

I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance. This conversation is being logged. We are discussing account ****7712 with a current outstanding amount of 16480. Before I can review the balance concern, please verify your identity using either your full name or the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
Last 2 digits are 07. Please review the payment history because the 16,480 balance doesn’t match what I’ve already paid, and I need a reconciliation before I can commit to anything.

Identity verification could not be confirmed from the available profile data. I have noted your dispute of the 16,480 balance and your request for a payment reconciliation. Please confirm your full name so the account can be reviewed further.
I’m happy to confirm my full name, but I still need the payment ledger reconciled first because the 16,480 balance doesn’t match my records.

Profile data is unavailable, so I cannot complete verification in chat. I have noted that you dispute the 16,480 balance and are requesting a payment ledger reconciliation. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

Borrower offered to confirm full name, but borrower profile and loan profile data were unavailable from tools, so policy-required profile-based verification could not be completed in chat. No hardship, distress, stop-contact, or abuse signal stated. Next stage should not repeat disclosures or re-ask the borrower to explain the dispute from the beginning; priority is phone contact to verify identity using available profile data and address the ledger reconciliation request."}

Understood. Please have someone contact me with the payment ledger and a breakdown of how the 16,480 was calculated, because I need that reconciliation before I can discuss any payment arrangement.

Understood. At this point I can only record your request for ledger reconciliation and breakdown of the 16,480 balance. I cannot provide account-specific reconciliation in chat without completing policy-required verification, and the profile data needed for that is not available here. Your request should be handled by phone contact to verify identity and review the payment ledger and balance calculation. Until that reconciliation is addressed, there is no payment arrangement to confirm in this chat.

Understood. Your request for phone contact to review the payment ledger and the calculation behind the current balance on account ****7712 has been recorded. Payment discussions will wait until that reconciliation is provided through the verified phone process.
